goal: Upgrade CI from reminder-style checks to blocking gates by ensuring formal test execution in PR validation and explicit blocking lint behavior.
constraints: Do not add new product features.
Keep changes focused on CI gating and verification scripts.
Preserve existing workflow structure; make minimal, clear tightening changes.
deliverables: PR validation workflow runs npm test as a blocking step.
Lint is explicitly documented/configured as blocking in workflow.
Task packet and durable knowledge updates reflect the CI hardening decision.
